executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
CRITICAL INSTRUCTIONS FOR ALL TESTS:
1. Use localhost:8000 as the base URL. The server is running locally.
2. For validation tests (TC002-TC008): Send invalid input and expect 422. Pydantic v2 returns type=string_too_short (not value_error.any_str.min_length) and loc=[body, field_name].
3. For TC005-TC008 (streaming endpoint validation): These endpoints accept the SAME request body as their non-streaming counterparts. They should return 422 for invalid input BEFORE starting the SSE stream.
4. TC009: GET /api/v1/skills — expect skills array. Use whatever skills exist.
5. TC010: GET /api/v1/skills/{name} — pick any skill from TC009's response.
6. TC011: DELETE /api/v1/skills/nonexistent-skill-xyz-999 — expect 404.
7. TC012: GET /api/v1/export/{name}/zip — use a skill name from TC009.
8. TC013: GET /api/v1/export/..%2F..%2Fetc/passwd — expect 400 Invalid path.
9. TC014: POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter/stream with username xyznonexistent999 — expect 502 from X API. This is fast (no CrewAI involved).
10. TC015: POST /api/v2/generate-skill/youtube/stream with invalid URL — expect 400.
11. ALL streaming endpoints (paths containing /stream) accept the same request body schema as their parent non-streaming endpoint.
